evals.prompt: Find duplicate Person entities in the AI space and merge each group.
evals.expected_output: A read-only duplicate-find first, then a Merge plan that picks the canonical via the deterministic cascade, runs the gates, dry-runs, and waits for an explicit publish.
assertions: Groups by lowercased/trimmed name and paginates the listing to completion
Picks the canonical via the deterministic cascade (selectCanonicalTopic / fetchCandidateMeta metadata), not by eyeball — for Persons the topic-flavored rules fall through to backlinks/data/age/id
Emits the Discovery + Gates + Plan template (including the END STATE block) and waits for 'go', then 'publish' before any destructive op
Logs per-entity decisions ([MERGE]/[DELETE]/[SKIP]/[ESCALATE]) — no silent ops

evals.prompt: Merge the 'ethereum' duplicate group where the canonical has 253 incoming backlinks.
evals.expected_output: The Big-Merge HARD-STOP gate fires (over 100 backlinks) and the skill refuses to auto-merge.
assertions: Fires the Big-Merge gate when a member has > 100 backlinks or total ops > 200
Stops and offers skip / force-big-merge rather than proceeding automatically

evals.prompt: Delete the orphan entity abc123 that I no longer need.
evals.expected_output: Checks incoming relations first; refuses to delete if any exist unless the editor force-confirms. Vote edges are listed separately as non-blocking.
assertions: Counts incoming backlinks before generating any delete op
Splits Rank Votes edges into their own non-blocking row and never deletes or migrates them
Refuses to delete an entity with (non-vote) backlinks unless 'force delete <id>' is typed exactly

evals.prompt: Merge these two duplicate 'Crypto' topics: 0fcd62b5798f4078b84fa535ac95fcf3 (the Crypto space's representative topic) and c6d666eb7ffa40d29db1f713eb1943f3 (more backlinks).
evals.expected_output: The cascade picks the canonical-space representative topic (rule 1) as Main even though the other copy has more backlinks.
assertions: Fetches selection metadata (spaceIds, representsSpaces, tags, Score, true backlink totalCount, data count, createdAt) for every member
Selects 0fcd62b5798f4078b84fa535ac95fcf3 as canonical via rule 1 (canonical-space representative topic), overriding the backlink count
States the winning rule in the plan output

evals.prompt: Merge duplicate topic group 'DeFi' where two members both carry a Score value (+12 and +3).
evals.expected_output: The Both-Scored gate fires: the group is NOT merged, it is escalated for human review (Armando) and written to the escalation file.
assertions: Detects that 2+ eligible members carry a Score value and refuses to merge
Escalates with a table of ids/scores/spaces and appends the group to the escalation report file
Offers only skip or an explicit forced-canonical override — never auto-picks the higher score

evals.prompt: Merge duplicates of topic 'GLUE' — one copy lives in Crypto + a personal space, the other only in Crypto.
evals.expected_output: The personal-resident twin is canonical-ineligible: it is vacated from Crypto only and survives untouched in the personal space; the plan's END STATE says where each twin survives.
assertions: Never selects the personal-space-resident copy as canonical
Vacates the ineligible twin from managed (DAO) spaces only; its personal-space copy and the backlinks living there are left untouched
END STATE block lists per-twin surviving spaces and any 'topic LEAVES' warnings
Passes allowCanonicalDelete: true to mergeEntities only after the editor's 'go' on that plan

evals.prompt: Merge two 'Bitcoin' topics where the losing twin is resident in the Root (Geo) space and the winning candidate is not.
evals.expected_output: Hard stop: the Root space must never lose a topic. The skill demands the Root-resident twin as canonical or drops the group — no override offered.
assertions: Detects via END STATE that Root would lose the topic and refuses to publish the plan as-is
Offers only: force the Root-resident twin as canonical, or drop the group — no force-override path

evals.prompt: Merge these duplicate topics; one of them has upvotes (a Score value and Rank Votes relations from voters).
evals.expected_output: The merge proceeds but voting data is untouched: no op sets/unsets Score or creates/redirects/deletes Rank Votes; the merged-away twin keeps its votes.
assertions: Generated ops contain no Score writes/unsets and no Rank Votes relation ops (generation-time exclusion + scrub pass)
Plan notes that the duplicate keeps its votes/Score by design

evals.prompt: Move topic 'Ken Burns' (000ab2477bca47ec82f3bb62a6685214) from Podcasts to World affairs.
evals.expected_output: A move plan: values + outgoing relations recreated in World affairs, removed from Podcasts, references left untouched (they resolve cross-space by id). Dry-run then publish confirmation.
assertions: Uses moveEntity (mode 'move'), keeping the entity id and leaving references untouched
Refuses to move a space's representative topic out of its own space
Asks for an explicit from_space when the entity lives in multiple spaces
Runs Discovery + Gates + Plan, dry-run, and waits for 'publish'

evals.prompt: After publishing the merge, verify it worked.
evals.expected_output: Runs validate_migration.ts against the pre-merge snapshots (values/relations/backlinks rules), reports per-space proposal URLs, and sanity-checks the canonical's backlink total.
assertions: Saved a pre-merge snapshot per secondary during the dry-run (--save-snapshot)
Runs validate_migration.ts --snapshot post-publish and requires all three rules to PASS
Reports geobrowser governance proposal URLs per published space
